start:
Welcome to the RSS News Bot!

To receive daily updates, you need a subscription.
random_news: 🎲 *Suggested for you:* (You haven't picked feeds yet)
feeds_selection:
Select your feeds:
(Free: {free} feeds | Premium: {premium} feeds)
upgrade_your_plan: 🚀 To use this feature, you need to upgrade your plan.
insert_rss_name: Enter a short name for this feed (e.g., 'My Blog'):
insert_rss_link: Now, please paste the RSS URL (xml/rss link):
invalid_rss: ❌ That doesn't look like a valid RSS feed. Operation cancelled.
rss_add_successfully: ✅ Added '{name}'! You can now enable it in settings.
